name: Garrett Motion Inc.
business: Garrett designs, manufactures and sells highly engineered turbocharging, air and fluid compression, and high-speed electric motor technologies for OEMs and independent aftermarket distributors in the mobility and industrial fields. Its products are key enablers for fuel economy, energy efficiency, thermal management, and compliance with greenhouse gas and other emission-reduction targets.

exposures.sentence: We provide a comprehensive range of electric air compressors to manufacturers of fuel cell systems.

We continue to develop our product range - including the introduction of our largest turbocharger, Garrett MEG - reinforcing our presence in marine and industrial applications, such as backup power generation for data centers.
Our products improve engine performance and enable lower emissions on trucks, buses, agriculture equipment, construction equipment and mining equipment.

As of 2025, our primary source of sales comes from the global turbocharger industry for gasoline, diesel and natural gas engines across light vehicle, on- and off-highway commercial vehicles and industrial applications as well as the aftermarket for these products.

We design, manufacture and sell highly engineered turbocharging, air and fluid compression, and high-speed electric motor technologies for original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) and independent aftermarket distributors in the mobility and industrial fields.

catalysts.sentence: Additionally, we were awarded our first E-Powertrain application in early 2025 and have made significant progress in our air and cooling compression technologies, as evidenced with various partnerships and pre-development contracts throughout 2025 and into early 2026.
In 2024, we delivered the first prototypes of our new industrial applications to a key OEM, and in 2025 we sold our first "MEG" (very large) turbochargers.

catalysts.event: Board authorized new $250 million share repurchase program for 2026
catalysts.sentence: On December 3, 2025, the Board of Directors authorized a new $250 million share repurchase program valid from January 1, 2026, until December 31, 2026.

tamClaims.sentence: We are a global leader in the $10 billion OEM turbocharger industry.
